proposal_summary: The proposal packages and executes three previously passed Snapshot proposals: EP8 to reimburse True Names, EP9 to change to the Exponential Premium Price Oracle, and EP10 to fund a DAO-Governed Identity Server.

disclosed_entities.name: True Names
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Reimburse True Names for expenses and tax obligations

disclosed_entities.name: DAO
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: incurred on behalf of the DAO

disclosed_entities.name: Exponential Premium Price Oracle
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Change to Exponential Premium Price Oracle

claimed_actions.raw_action: Reimburse True Names for expenses and tax obligations
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Reimburses the entity for expenses incurred for the DAO
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: [EP8] [Executable] Reimburse True Names for expenses and tax obligations incurred on behalf of the DAO

claimed_actions.raw_action: Change to Exponential Premium Price Oracle
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Updates the oracle used for ENS premium pricing
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: [EP9] [Executable] Change to Exponential Premium Price Oracle

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Allocates funds to an identity server governed by the DAO

claimed_complexity.reason: The proposal bundles three distinct executable items (fund transfers and an oracle update), requiring multiple state changes.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: Executes EP8, EP9 and EP10 as passed on Snapshot

limitations: The text only includes Snapshot hashes, but lacks the actual on-chain payload addresses, target contract addresses, and execution parameters (such as fund amounts).
